prompt: A dramatic vintage anime poster in the style of a gritty sci-fi mecha key visual, featuring three teenage pilots standing back-to-back in the foreground and a towering purple biomechanical robot looming directly behind them. The center pilot is a slim teenage boy in a dark navy and black plug suit with white shoulder panels and a glowing red circular core on the chest, standing front-facing with a serious expression. On the left is a pale teenage girl with short icy blue bob-cut hair and a white futuristic bodysuit, turned slightly away in profile. On the right is a teenage girl with long auburn hair flowing to the side, wearing a vivid red plug suit, looking outward with determination. Behind all three, the giant mecha head dominates the composition, centered and symmetrical, with a single horn, glowing orange eyes, angular armor, and massive shoulder structures rising like black wings. The background is outer space with 2 visible celestial bodies: 1 huge cratered moon directly behind the mecha’s head and 1 smaller planet at the right side. The bottom of the poster shows a ruined futuristic cityscape with broken buildings, rubble, sparks, and debris. At the very bottom center, include 2 tiny human silhouettes running forward through destruction, framed by pink energy streaks arcing left and right. Use a dark indigo, black, purple, rust red, and ash gray palette with heavy film grain, distressed ink texture, weathered paper wear, paint splatter, scratched print damage, and a rough screen-printed poster finish. Compose it as a full theatrical one-sheet with dense typography integrated into the edges: large vertical English title text on the left reading "NEON GENESIS EVANGELION", smaller vertical red text beside it reading "HIRANO OF EVANGELION", a red NERV insignia and the word "NERV" near the lower left, a boxed label at bottom left reading "TOKYO-3" and "JAPAN", a red warning box at the upper right reading "ANGEL ATTACK" with Japanese characters beneath, and multiple vertical Japanese taglines along the left and right borders. Cinematic, moody, apocalyptic, highly detailed, iconic 1990s anime poster design with premium modern illustration quality.
